final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for an automotive brand launch announcement.

Style/medium: needs a translucent, visually striking hero-image aesthetic with strong brand presence — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide landscape layout suitable for a presentation cover, with title and subtitle overlaid on the background
Subject: must include the 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop that feels transparent and awe-inspiring — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a powerful, high-impact atmosphere that conveys a premium automotive brand launch — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with automotive brand sophistication — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" and "9月上市"
Constraints: must include a title and subtitle text block that integrates naturally with the background composition
Avoid:
